title: Main account 0guard HackQuest update
tweets:
0guard is submitted for the 0G APAC Hackathon.

Built as a pre-wallet firewall for AI agents: intent, calldata, policy, reputation context, and exploit signatures are checked before a signer sees the request.

#0GHackathon #BuildOn0G

What is live now:

- Telegram Mini App
- public proof hub
- 0G mainnet receipt anchor
- 30 rights-aware source lanes
- 17 no-network reputation connector candidates
- deterministic receipts

No signing. No broadcasts. No fund movement.

The thesis is simple: AI agents should not get to the wallet first.

0guard makes the security checkpoint native to agent workflows instead of stapled on after the wallet prompt.

Live proof:
https://arigatoexpress.github.io/0guard/hackathon-0g/

Mini App:
https://guard0-miniapp-s77j6bxyra-uc.a.run.app/telegram

Repo:
https://github.com/arigatoexpress/0guard

Next: the cleaner video cut.
